allow: Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua for _,f in ipairs\({"lua/plugins/lsp.lua","lua/plugins/autopairs.lua","lua/plugins/completion.lua","lua/config/settings.lua"}\) do local ok,err=loadfile\(f\); print\(\(ok and "OK " or "ERR "\)..f..\(err and \(" "..err\) or ""\)\) end' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua for _,m in ipairs\({"bufferline","flash","ibl","barbecue","nvim-navic"}\) do local ok=pcall\(require,m\); print\(\(ok and "OK   " or "FAIL "\)..m\) end' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\(vim.fn.exists\(":EasyAlign"\)==2 and "OK EasyAlign loaded" or "FAIL"\)' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua require\("lazy"\).load\({plugins={"vim-easy-align"}}\)' -c 'lua print\(vim.fn.exists\(":EasyAlign"\)==2 and "OK loads on demand" or "FAIL"\)' -c 'qa')

Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua local ok,tc=pcall\(require,"treesitter-context"\); print\(ok and "loaded" or "not loaded"\); print\("TSContext cmd exists: "..tostring\(vim.fn.exists\(":TSContext"\)\)\)' -c 'qa')

Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua print\("bufferline present: "..tostring\(pcall\(require,"bufferline"\)\)\)' -c 'lua require\("lazy"\).load\({plugins={"nvim-treesitter-context"}}\); local c=require\("treesitter-context.config"\); print\("max_lines="..tostring\(c.max_lines\).." enabled="..tostring\(c.enable\)\)' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua local ok=pcall\(vim.cmd,"colorscheme tokyonight"\); print\("tokyonight applies: "..tostring\(ok\).." | active: "..tostring\(vim.g.colors_name\)\)' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua local ok,e=loadfile\("C:/Users/rngat/proj/dotconf/wezterm/wezterm.lua"\); print\(ok and "OK wezterm.lua parses" or \("ERR "..tostring\(e\)\)\)' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua require\("lazy"\).load\({plugins={"nvim-treesitter-context"}}\); local m=require\("treesitter-context"\); print\("toggle is function: "..type\(m.toggle\)\)' -c 'qa')
Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua local ok,e=loadfile\("C:/Users/rngat/proj/dotconf/wezterm/wezterm.lua"\); print\(ok and "wezterm OK" or \("ERR "..tostring\(e\)\)\)' -c 'qa')

Bash(nvim --headless -c 'lua require\("lazy"\).load\({plugins={"nvim-treesitter"}}\)' -c 'TSInstallSync! cpp bash python' -c 'lua local p=require\("nvim-treesitter.info"\).installed_parsers\(\); print\("INSTALLED: "..table.concat\(p, ", "\)\)' -c qa)

PowerShell(foreach \($t in 'winget','scoop','choco','npm','cargo'\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "{0} -> {1}" -f $t, $c.Source } else { "$t -> \(not found\)" } }; "---"; "nvim install path: " + \(Get-Command nvim\).Source)

Bash(nvim --headless lua/config/settings.lua "+lua vim.defer_fn\(function\(\) local loaded = package.loaded['mason-lspconfig'] ~= nil and package.loaded['blink.cmp'] ~= nil; print\('lsp+blink loaded on BufRead: '..tostring\(loaded\)\); vim.cmd\('qa!'\) end, 200\)")
